Bay Lake restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Bay Lake restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 25 Bay Lake restaurants we grade, 25 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Bay Lake restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Bay Lake?

We currently publish 25 graded restaurants in Bay Lake, with an average diner rating of 4.4 stars; 25 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
